mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = nil
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  self.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = self.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=""
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data.at("from").to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"

    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  mail = Mail.new

  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body

      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=", "
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array().join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(nil).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new

  html_body = data["html"]

      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body

    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data.at("subject").to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data.key?("subject").to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new

  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")

  html_body = self["html"]

      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = nil
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"

    end

  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    self.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    nil
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

end

    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    nil

    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"

      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"

    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type=""
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

end

end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      nil
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body

    html_part = Mail::Part.new

    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=nil
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=""
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new

  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")

  html_body = data["html"]

    text_part.body=text_body

    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    unless html_body
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    text_part.body=text_body

    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=self.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def create
  email_id = @payload.dig("data", "email_id")
  unless email_id
    return head(:unprocessable_entity)
  end
  email_data = ::Resend::Emails::Receiving.get(email_id)
  raw_mime = build_raw_email(email_data)
  ActionMailbox::InboundEmail.create_and_extract_message_id!(raw_mime)
  head(:ok)
rescue StandardError => e
  Rails.logger.error("Resend inbound email processing failed: #{e.message}")
  head(:unprocessable_entity)
end
